highlights: Early-stage Web3 music startup; sole backend engineer responsible for Firebase database architecture, Python APIs with Firebase Functions, and React admin interfaces for a platform connecting music creators and festival audiences.
Designed and implemented concert NFT distribution using Google Maps/Geolocation APIs with proximity-based rules; built data synchronization between application state and blockchain records.
Delivered production infrastructure for a major music festival with 300,000+ attendees.
Built a scheduled-tasks management system end-to-end, including Pydantic data models, CRUD APIs on Firebase Functions, a React admin UI with data grid, form validation, and bulk operations.
Wrote a 10+-scenario test suite covering edge cases and large-batch Firestore processing.

Built notification badge systems using stream queries to reduce Firestore overhead, developed sticker collections UI with TanStack Query and lazy-loaded JSON viewer, and integrated GoHighLevel CRM for automated contact sync and tag management.
Led project-based coding classes for students ages 4-18, helping learners build games, websites, and apps while adapting explanations to different ages, skill levels, and learning styles.
Delivered Coding With Kids' Coder's Ladder curriculum, including block-based programming with Scratch and text-based concepts in Python and JavaScript.
Maintained a safe, positive, and engaging learning environment for online and in-person classes while supporting students with diverse abilities.
Prepared lesson plans, guided debugging and project completion, sent class notes and progress feedback to parents, and maintained a 100% customer satisfaction rate.
Built supportive relationships with students and families through patient instruction, individualized help, and follow-up, contributing to an 80% student retention rate.
Worked with program coordinators to follow curriculum standards, support after-school and camp-style instruction, and improve the student learning experience.
Designed and shipped a web scraping and data processing system for an arts NGO using Lambda, S3, API Gateway, EventBridge, Step Functions, Python, BeautifulSoup, Requests, and spaCy.
Built an end-to-end ingestion and cleaning pipeline for multi-source, multi-format artist data from artist sites and social platforms.
Increased artist information accuracy to 80-90%, reduced manual data entry by about 80%, and lowered infrastructure costs by about 70% via pay-per-use AWS Lambda.
Connected Airtable as the system of record, exposed APIs for downstream tools, documented the architecture, and delivered demos to non-technical stakeholders.
Delivered in-person support for service, billing, device, and connectivity issues in a fast-paced retail environment while maintaining a consecutive yearly average 100% customer satisfaction rate.
Explained internet, mobile, device, accessory, and service-plan features in customer-friendly language to support confident purchase, setup, and troubleshooting decisions.
Identified customer needs through active listening and recommended Comcast products, service upgrades, and accessories to improve customer experience and support sales goals.
Supported inventory, device readiness, product displays, transactions, and service compliance while documenting recurring technical issues and customer concerns.
Worked with leadership, IT, operations, and retail teammates to improve store efficiency, resolve recurring issues, and communicate customer feedback for process improvements.
Collaborated on a C# .NET web application for medical image judging using Razor Pages and Git in an Agile environment.
Developed image processing algorithms to detect rotation, color imbalance, and brightness issues, improving medical image assessment accuracy.
Designed and implemented dynamic UI components that improved the judging interface, accessibility, and cross-browser compatibility.
Contributed to data model redesign for ImageSeverity and ResultImage while refactoring the test suite to improve organization and reduce redundancy.
Achieved 100% code coverage through unit testing, made over 20 Git commits, and reduced page load time by 30%.
Facilitated recruitment events for undergraduates interested in alumni connections and resources.
Established and maintained working relationships with partner offices across campus, including the Department of Science and Engineering and Career Engagement.
Tracked alumni network enrollment and current student graduation status, maintained previous student records, and reported enrollment statistics.
Handled sensitive student information while maintaining high confidentiality standards.

jobname: Seattle Central College - Ambassador, Information Central
highlights: Assisted prospective, current, former, and incoming students through email, phone, LiveChat, and social media by answering school-related questions and directing them to resources.
Guided new students through school systems, campus resources, enrollment steps, and service processes to improve their transition experience.
Helped train incoming ambassadors on communication standards, student support workflows, and common service questions.
Provided accurate and timely information about school services, departments, processes, and student resources in a high-volume support environment.

buttonText: Retail Sales + Customer Service + Store Operations
highlights: Assisted customers with mobile products, service plans, accessories, account questions, and purchasing decisions in a wireless retail environment.
Explained phone features, plan options, promotions, and service details to help customers select products that matched their needs and budget.
Handled customer concerns, returns, exchanges, service questions, sales, and payment transactions through POS systems.
Supported inventory monitoring, merchandise restocking, product organization, display maintenance, and general store cleanliness.
Greeted customers, answered product questions, provided recommendations, and supported a positive in-store shopping experience.
Educated customers about new products, promotions, and merchandise features to support purchasing decisions and increase sales opportunities.
Conducted cash and credit card transactions through POS systems with attention to accuracy and customer service standards.
Restocked merchandise, organized new inventory, monitored product availability, and maintained clean retail displays.
